arts.ttl: “In five months there will be Champions League again” — Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany looks forward despite UCL elimination
arts.sum: Looking for more thoughts and analysis of Bayern Munich 2-2 draw with Inter Milan in the Champions League that saw the Bavarians eliminated from the competition on an aggregate score of 4-3? We’re not going to play the final in Munich, but in five months there will be Champions League again and a lot of games in Munich.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils get 'definitive answer' as they suffer Leon Goretzka transfer blow
arts.sum: Bayern Munich midfielder Leon Goretzka reportedly wants to remain at Bayern Munich past this season, damaging Manchester United's transfer plans.

arts.ttl: Man Utd push for €60m 'new Neuer' transfer as Onana replacement
arts.sum: Although Onana is expected to return to Amorim’s side for the Europa League quarter-final second leg against Lyon on Thursday, United have begun to scout long-term successors to the Cameroonian in the hopes of signing a new keeper this summer. Frankfurt extended Santos’ contract in October until 2030 and signalled to the player that they are planning on him for the long-term and believe that he is best suited to continue developing at the club.

arts.ttl: Former Bayern Munich defender Benjamin Pavard happy to turn out lights on “powerhouse” with Inter Milan
arts.sum: Former Bayern Munich defender Benjamin Pavard had some great times at the club before moving on to Inter Milan . Pavard and Inter Milan will move on to face FC Barcelona in the Champions League semifinals.

arts.ttl: Angel City hires former Bayern manager Straus
arts.sum: Angel City FC has hired Alexander Straus as the team's new head coach following an extensive search that sporting director Mark Parsons detailed to ESPN.

arts.ttl: Ex-German referee: Lautaro Martinez’s goal vs. Bayern should not have stood
arts.sum: Former German referee Manuel Grafe believes Lautaro Martinez’s equaliser against Bayern Munich last night should...

arts.ttl: Why Serie A President wore Inter scarf during UCL QF against Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Italian media have explained why Lega Serie A President Ezio Maria Simonelli, a Milan fan,...

arts.ttl: Thomas Müller says he has not spared a thought for his future after Bayern Munich...yet
arts.sum: Despite faint hopes of Bayern Munich lifting the Champions League trophy in the Finale Dahoam thanks to a dramatic Thomas Müller winner, the 4-3 aggregate loss to Inter Milan in the quarterfinals of Europe’s elite competition means that those hopes have been totally extinguished. Müller’s last ever UCL match with Bayern ends in (aggregate) defeat.
